claims.summary: Hybrid fingerprint coherence should reject malformed or non-finite legacy data.
claims.disposition: Verified exact length, finite-value, typed-precedence, RMS, and max-delta checks.

claims.summary: The additive 12D glimpse should reject non-finite or wrong-length values.
A borrowed 12D slice could outlive or be invalidated by telemetry mutation.
claims.disposition: Corrected from Rust ownership: the returned slice is lifetime-bound to an immutable borrow of telemetry.

claims.summary: Typed spectral geometry should be reconstructed deterministically from legacy slots when needed.
claims.disposition: Verified SpectralFingerprintV1::from_telemetry and hybrid integrity tests.

claims.summary: The shadow_field_v3 compatibility object should become a new typed wire contract.
claims.disposition: Preserved as a Tier 5 cross-repository protocol/schema change.
